confidence_rationale: This is clearly an instructional demonstration video showing Roeder's knot tying technique, not an actual FLS Task 4 performance. No Penrose drain, suture marks, or laparoscopic trainer box visible.
cannot_determine: Actual task completion time - this is instructional content
Suture placement accuracy - no Penrose drain or marks present
FLS score - no actual task performance to evaluate
Task-specific penalties - demonstration only, not performance assessment
technique_summary: This appears to be an educational demonstration of Roeder's knot technique rather than an actual FLS Task 4 performance. The video shows proper extracorporeal knot formation technique but lacks the required elements for FLS scoring (Penrose drain, marked suture placement points, laparoscopic environment).
strengths: Clear demonstration of Roeder's knot technique
Educational value for learning extracorporeal knot tying
improvement_suggestions: For FLS assessment, video should show actual task performance with Penrose drain
Include suture placement through marked points on drain
